TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Alexander_(actor), title = John_Alexander_(actor), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Alexander_(actor)} }

S.FORM: John Alexander kawas tay 1897, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, John Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
John Alexander kawas tay 1897, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 11, John Alexander, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 1982) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *oħn alexan*er kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, *oħn alexan*er, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. (wal mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
